name: Multi Active Subjects Same Workflow Pipeline
description: Single workflow with multiple active subject work items under the same assessment model.
outcome: Several subject work items can remain active concurrently without losing explicit subject linkage.

definition.process_instructions: Multiple active work items may exist at once. Each subject must keep its own assessment lineage even while several sibling work items are active in the same workflow.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: multi-subject-validation
stages.goal: Concurrent subjects are delivered and assessed cleanly.

checkpoints.name: multi-subject-validation
checkpoints.goal: Concurrent subjects are delivered and assessed cleanly.
